lineup_source: Projected starting XI based on 2026 qualifying/squad news (GK Al-Aqidi; DF Abdulhamid, Tambakti, Lajami, Al-Amri; MF Kanno, Al-Khaibari, Al-Dawsari S., Al-Dawsari N.; FW Al-Buraikan, Al-Shehri)

players.name: Nawaf Al-Aqidi
players.note: Born in Riyadh; no documented foreign parentage, squad is overwhelmingly home-born.

players.name: Saud Abdulhamid
players.note: Born in Jeddah; no documented foreign heritage found.

players.name: Hassan Al-Tambakti
players.note: Born in Riyadh; Al-Shabab/Al-Hilal academy product with no documented foreign parentage.

players.name: Ali Lajami
players.note: Born in Saihat, Eastern Province; twin brother also plays for a Saudi club, no foreign heritage documented.

players.name: Abdulelah Al-Amri
players.note: Born in 1997; captained Saudi U-20s, no documented foreign parentage.

players.name: Mohamed Kanno
players.note: Born in Khobar; no documented foreign heritage despite distinctive surname.

players.name: Abdullah Al-Khaibari
players.note: Born in Riyadh; Al-Nassr midfielder with no documented foreign parentage.

players.name: Salem Al-Dawsari
players.note: Team captain, born in Jeddah; no documented foreign heritage.

players.name: Nasser Al-Dawsari
players.note: Al-Hilal academy product since age 13, no documented foreign parentage.

players.name: Firas Al-Buraikan
players.note: Born in Riyadh; scored vs Argentina at 2022 World Cup, no documented foreign heritage.

players.name: Saleh Al-Shehri
players.note: Born in Jeddah; scored vs Argentina at 2022 World Cup, no documented foreign parentage.
